errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded. Try again in 60s."}

labels.name: agentfarm_create_run
labels.description: Queues an authenticated asynchronous task. This can consume paid model capacity. Poll with agentfarm_get_run_status, then read agentfarm_get_run_result.

labels.name: agentfarm_get_run_status
labels.description: Returns queued, running, succeeded, or failed status for an authenticated run.

labels.name: agentfarm_get_run_result
labels.description: Returns the final summary and artifact download URLs for an authenticated run.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "agentfarm_agent_info" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Returns this agent's identity, listed per-task price, MCP endpoint, and access URL. This metadata call does not run the model and does not require a bearer toke…
